info.title: Museum Management System - Iunu API
info.description: Iunu API is a Museum Managment System, named after the ancient city of Heliopolis. It allows museums to manage their collections, research studies, and funds.

get.summary: Returns a list of attributes in the Museum Managment System.
get.description: Returns a list of attributes (the characteristics an item in the museum can have). Includes option to filter the selected attributes by name and date it was added in the system on, plus sorting and paging functionality.

parameters.name: attrName
parameters.description: Used to filter the list by attribute name

parameters.name: dtCreated
parameters.description: Used to filter by the attribute creation date.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the attributes by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the attributes in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: here's a list of the (optionally filtered and sorted) attributes.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

get.summary: Returns the details for a specific attribute
get.description: Returns the data for a given attribute by its ID.

400.description: Attribute not found.

schema.example: Attribute not found

post.description: Creates a new attribute with user-inputted attribute name. Creation date, ID, and other values are generated in the code

400.description: Attribute name is invalid or empty.

schema.example: Name is required

get.summary: Returns a list of values for a specific attribute.
get.description: Returns a list of values for a specified attribute (by Id). Includes options to filter the values by their name and creation date, plus sorting and paging functionality.

parameters.name: attrId
parameters.description: ID of the attribute.

parameters.name: valueName
parameters.description: Used to filter the list by attribute value name.

parameters.name: dtCreated
parameters.description: Used to filter by the attribute value creation date.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the attribute values by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the attribute values in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: here's a list of the (optionally filtered and sorted) attribute values.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

post.summary: Add a value to an attribute
post.description: Adds a value to the list of possible attribute values.

400.description: The value is invalid or the attribute was not found.

schema.example: Attribute not found / Name is required

400.description: Invalid new name.
Invalid new name or the atrribute was not found.

delete.description: Marks an attribute as deleted in the system.
Marks atrribute value as deleted in the system.

get.summary: Returns a list of collections in the Museum Management System.
get.description: Returns a list of museum collections. Includes options to filter the selected collections by name and the user it was created by, plus sorting and paging functionality.

parameters.name: collName
parameters.description: Used to filter the list by collection name.

parameters.name: userName
parameters.description: Used to filter by the collection's creator.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the collections by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the collections in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: Here is the list of the (optionally filtered and sorted) collections.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

post.description: Adds a new collection to the database. Date of creation, user creator, id, and other values are automatically calculated.

400.description: Validation failed: Collection name is missing or contains only whitespace.

schema.example: The collection name is required

post.description: Updates the collection name based on its unique ID.

400.description: Collection not found.

schema.example: Collection not found

delete.description: Marks a collection as deleted in the system.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: The ID of the collection to delete.

schema.example: Collection not found

get.summary: Returns a list of exhibits with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of exhibits based on user roles. Administrators see all items, while curators see only their assigned items. Supports paging, sorting, and filtering by three fields (title,startDate and endDate). Validates user claims (`userid` and `roleid`) from the attached JWT token.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Used to filter the list by exhibit title.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Used to filter exhibits with a start date bigger than the given one.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Used to filter exhibits with a end date smaller than the given one.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the exhibits by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the exhibits in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: Here is the list of the (optionally filtered and sorted) exhibits.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

401.description: Unauthorized access (Missing or invalid JWT token).

get.summary: Returns details for a specific exhibit
get.description: Returns the data for the specified exhibit.

parameters.name: exhibitId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the exhibit.

400.description: Exhibit not found.

schema.example: Exhibit not found

post.description: Adds a new exhibit. ID, creation date and user creator.

400.description: Validation failed: Empty fields, invalide begining/end date, entry price < 0 or curator (user creating the exhibit) not found.

schema.example: Title is required / Description is required / Start date is required. / End date is required. / Entry price is required. / Curator not found.

post.description: Edits an exhibit.

400.description: Empty fields, invalid start/end dates, exhibit not found, or curator ot found.

schema.example: Exhibit not found / Curator not found.

delete.description: Marks an exhibit as deleted.

parameters.name: exhibitId
parameters.description: The ID of the exhibit to be soft-deleted.

schema.example: Exhibit not found

get.summary: Returns items assigned to a specific exhibit with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of items, assigned to the given exhibit. Includes options to filter results by item name and date it was added.

parameters.name: exhibitId
parameters.description: The ID of the exhibit.

parameters.name: itemName
parameters.description: Used to filter items by name.

parameters.name: dtAdded
parameters.description: Used to filter items by date added to the exhibit.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the assigned items by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the items in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: List of assigned items retrieved.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

get.summary: Returns items not assigned to a specific exhibit with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of museum items that are not a part of the specified exhibit. Used for adding new items to the exhibit. Includes option to filter results by item name and creation date.

parameters.name: exhibitId
parameters.description: The ID of the exhibit the items don't belong to.

parameters.name: itemName
parameters.description: Used to filter available items by name.

parameters.name: dtCreated
parameters.description: Used to filter available items by creation date.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the available items by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the items in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: List of available items retrieved.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

post.summary: Links an item to an exhibit
post.description: Creates a many-to-many relationship record between an Exhibit and an Item. Validates the existence of both the exhibit and the item before saving.

200.description: Item added to the exhibit successfully.

400.description: Validation failed: Exhibit or Item not found.

schema.example: Exhibit not found / Item not found

delete.summary: Removes an item from an exhibit (Soft Delete)
delete.description: Marks the exhibit-item entry as deleted

parameters.name: ehxitemId
parameters.description: The ID of the exhibit-item.

404.description: The item does not belong to the exhibit.

schema.example: The item does not belong to the exhibit.

get.summary: Returns rooms assigned to a specific exhibit with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of museum rooms currently assigned to the given exhibit. Includes options to filter results by room name and date the room was assigned to the exhibit.

parameters.name: exhibitId
parameters.description: The ID of the exhibit.

parameters.name: roomName
parameters.description: Used to filter assigned rooms by name.

parameters.name: dtAdded
parameters.description: Used to filter assigned rooms by date they were added to the exhibit.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the assigned rooms by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the rooms in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: List of assigned museum rooms retrieved.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

get.summary: Returns rooms not assigned to the specific exhibit with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a  list of museum rooms that are currently free. Used for assigning new rooms to the exhibit. Includes options to filter results by room name and creation date.

parameters.name: exhibitId
parameters.description: The ID of the exhibit the rooms don't beloong to.

parameters.name: roomName
parameters.description: Used to filter available rooms by name.

parameters.name: dtCreated
parameters.description: Used to filter available rooms by creation date.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the available rooms by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the rooms in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: List of available museum rooms retrieved.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

post.summary: Adds a room to an exhibit
post.description: Creates a many-to-many relationship record between an Exhibit and a Room. Verifies that both the exhibit and the room exist before saving the data.

200.description: Room successfully added to the exhibit.

400.description: Validation failed: The exhibit or the room not found.

schema.example: Exhibit not found / Room not found

delete.summary: Removes a room from an exhibit (Soft Delete)
delete.description: Marks exhibit-room entry as deleted.

parameters.name: ehxroomId
parameters.description: The ID of the exhibit-room.

200.description: Room removed from the exhibit successfully.

404.description: The room does not belong to the exhibit.

schema.example: The room does not belong to the exhibit.

get.summary: Returns a list of funds with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of funding records in the museum system. Supports paging, sorting, and filtering by two fields (amount and studyName).

parameters.name: studyName
parameters.description: Used to filter funds by the research study they are for.

parameters.name: minAmount
parameters.description: Used to filter funds with an amount greater than or equal to the given.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the funds by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the funds in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: Here is the list of the (optionally filtered and sorted) funds.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

get.summary: Returns details for a specific fund
get.description: Retrieves the data for a given fund.

parameters.name: fundId
parameters.description: The ID of the fund.

post.description: Adds a new funding entry. Validates currency, reason, partner, and study.

400.description: Validation failed: Currency or reason missing, or related partner/study not found.

schema.example: Currency is required / Reason is required / Partner not found / Study not found

post.description: Updates all editable values of a fund based on its ID.

400.description: Validation failed: Empty fields, or related partner/study/fund not found.

schema.example: Fund not found / Partner not found / Study not found

delete.description: Marks a fund record as deleted.

parameters.name: fundId
parameters.description: The unique database ID of the fund to soft-delete.

schema.example: Fund not found

get.summary: Returns attribute values for a given item with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of attributes and their values for a given museum item. Supports filtering by attribute name and value name.

parameters.name: itemId
parameters.description: The ID of the item.

parameters.name: attrName
parameters.description: Used to filter results by the attribute's name.

parameters.name: valueName
parameters.description: Used to filter results by the specific value.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the item attribute values by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the results in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: List of item attribute values retrieved.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

post.summary: Assigns an attribute value to an item
post.description: Links a specific attribute value to a museum item. Validates both the item and the attribute exist.

200.description: Attribute value successfully assigned to the item.

400.description: Validation failed: Attribute or value not found.

schema.example: Item not found / Attribute Value not found

delete.summary: Removes an attribute value from an item (Soft Delete)
delete.description: Marks an attribute value for an item as deleted.

parameters.name: iavId
parameters.description: The ID from ItemAttrValues.

404.description: The attribute value does not belong to the item.

schema.example: This value does not belong to the item.

get.summary: Returns a list of items with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of museum items. Supports paging, sorting, and filtering by two fields (item name and international ID).

parameters.name: itemName
parameters.description: Used to filter the list by item name.

parameters.name: internationalID
parameters.description: Used to filter the list by its international id.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the items by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the items in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: Here is the list of the (optionally filtered and sorted) museum items.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

get.summary: Returns details for a specific item
get.description: Retrieves the data for a given museum item.

parameters.name: itemId
parameters.description: The ID of the item.

400.description: Item not found.

schema.example: Item not found

post.description: Adds a new museum item to the system. ID and date are generated automatically.

400.description: Validation failed: Name is missing or the collection does not exist.

schema.example: Name is required / Collection not found.

post.description: Modifies all editable fields of a museum item based on its ID. Validates fields, collection existance, and item existence.

400.description: Invalid or empty fields, item not found, collection not found.

schema.example: Item not found / Collection not found.

delete.description: Marks an item as deleted.

parameters.name: itemId
parameters.description: The ID of the item.

schema.example: Item not found

get.summary: Returns a list of loans with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of internal and external museum item loans. Supports paging, sorting, and filtering by two fields (loan type and status).

parameters.name: loanType
parameters.description: Used to filter loans by type.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Used to filter loans by their state.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the loans by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the loans in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: Here is the list of the (optionally filtered and sorted) loans.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

get.summary: Returns details for a specific loan
get.description: Retrieves the data for a specific loan.

parameters.name: loanId
parameters.description: The ID of the loan.

post.description: Adds a new entry for an item loan. Generates the ID, creation date, and validates the type and partner.

400.description: Validation failed: Partner not found or loan type is invalid.

schema.example: Partner not found / Invalid loan type!

post.description: Modifies fields of a loan record. Validates partner, loan existence, and loan type.

400.description: Partner or loan type not found or invalid.

schema.example: Partner not found / Invalid loan type!
Loan not found

delete.description: Flags a loan as deleted.

parameters.name: loanId
parameters.description: The ID of the loan.

schema.example: Loan not found

get.summary: Returns items in a given loan with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of museum items in a given loan. Includes options to filter results by item name and date it was added to the loan.

parameters.name: loanID
parameters.description: The ID of the loan.

parameters.name: itemName
parameters.description: Used to filter loan items by name.

parameters.name: dtCreated
parameters.description: Used to filter loan items by the date they were added to the loan.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the items by (e.g., 'itemName' or 'dt').

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the results in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: List of items assigned to the loan retrieved.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

post.summary: Adds an item to a loan
post.description: Creates a many-to-many connection between an item and a loan. Validates the existence of both item and loan.

200.description: Item added to the loan successfully.

400.description: Validation failed: The loan or item not found.

schema.example: Loan not found / Item not found

delete.summary: Removes an item from a loan (Soft Delete)
delete.description: Marks a loan item as deleted

parameters.name: litemId
parameters.description: The ID from the LoanItems table.

404.description: Item doesn't belong to the loan.

schema.example: Item doesn't belong to the loan

get.summary: Returns a list of partner types with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Returns a list of types for museum partners. Supports filtering by type name and creation date.

parameters.name: typeName
parameters.description: Used to filter partner types by name.

parameters.name: dtCreated
parameters.description: Used to filter partner types by their creation date.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the types by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the results in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: List of partner types retrieved.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

get.summary: Returns a list of partners with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of museum partners. Supports filtering by partner name and VAT number.

parameters.name: partnerName
parameters.description: Used to filter partner organisations by their name.

parameters.name: vat
parameters.description: Used to filter partners by their VAT number.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the partners by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the results in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

get.summary: Returns details for a specific partner
get.description: Retrieves the data for a given partner.

parameters.name: partnerId
parameters.description: The ID of the partner organisation.

post.description: Adds a partner organisation to the museum's system. Validates strings for required inputs and checks if the partner type exists.

400.description: Validation failed: Missing values or type not found.

schema.example: Name is required / VAT is required / Type not found

post.description: Adds a partner type to the museum's system.

400.description: Validation failed: Name value cannot be empty.

schema.example: Name is required

post.description: Modifies an existing partner record. Validates partner and type exist, validates field input values.

400.description: Empty values, partner type not found, partner not found.

schema.example: Name is required / Type not found / Partner not found

post.description: Modifies a given partner type.

400.description: Name empty, partner type not found.

schema.example: Name is required / Type not found

delete.description: Marks partner type as deleted.

parameters.name: typeId
parameters.description: The ID of the partner type.

schema.example: Type not found

delete.description: Marks a partner as deleted.

parameters.name: partnerId
parameters.description: The ID of the partner.

schema.example: Partner not found

get.summary: Returns a list of rooms with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of museum rooms. Supports paging, sorting, and filtering by two fields (room name and maximum temperature threshold).

parameters.name: roomName
parameters.description: Used to filter rooms by their name.

parameters.name: maxTemperature
parameters.description: Used to filter rooms with an ambient temperature less than or equal to this value.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the rooms by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the rooms in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: Here is the list of the (optionally filtered and sorted) rooms.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

get.summary: Returns details for a specific room
get.description: Retrieves the data for a given room.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: The ID of the room.

400.description: Room not found.

schema.example: Room not found

post.description: Adds a new room to the Museum's database with environment requirements (temperature, humidity, light exposure).

400.description: Room name is missing or invalid.

schema.example: Room name is required

post.description: Updates the name and environmental specifications of a given room.

400.description: Invalid input field values or room not found.

schema.example: Room not found

delete.description: Marks a room as deleted.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: The ID of the room.

schema.example: Room not found

get.summary: Returns a list of students with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of students registered for ineternships at the museum. Supports filtering by the student's full name and the partner organisation they come from.

parameters.name: fullName
parameters.description: Used to filter students by their name.

parameters.name: partnerName
parameters.description: Used to filter students based on the name of the partner university or organization they are a part of.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the students by (e.g., 'fullName' or 'partnerName').

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the results in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: List of students retrieved successfully.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

get.summary: Returns details for a specific student
get.description: Retrieves the data for a given student.

parameters.name: studentId
parameters.description: The ID of the student.

post.description: Registers a new student. Generates the ID, creation date, and verifies the partner organisation exists.

400.description: Empty/Invalid input fields or the partner organisation not found.

schema.example: First name is required / Last name is required / Partner not found

post.description: Modifies the details of a student's data. Validates text fields, partner existence, and student existance.

400.description: Invvalid input for name/Partner organisation not found/Student not found.

schema.example: First name is required / First name is required / Partner not found / Student not found

delete.description: Marks a student as deleted.

parameters.name: studentId
parameters.description: The ID of the student.

schema.example: Student not found

get.summary: Returns a list of research studies with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of research studies. If the user is not an administrator, the list shows only studies assigned to the logged researcher. The user information is taken automatically from the jwt token

parameters.name: studyName
parameters.description: Used to filter the list by study name.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Used to filter studies by their status.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the studies by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the studies in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: Here is the list of research studies.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

get.summary: Returns details for a specific research study
get.description: Retrieves the data for a given study.

parameters.name: studyId
parameters.description: The id of the study.

post.description: Adds a new studyto the database.ID, creation date, and logged reseracher are added automatically. Validates input fields.

400.description: Invalid or empty input fields.

schema.example: Study name is required.

401.description: Unauthorized access. User must be logged in.

post.description: Modifies the data for a given study.

400.description: Study not found.

schema.example: Study not found

delete.description: Marks a study as deleted.

parameters.name: studyId
parameters.description: The ID of the research study.

schema.example: Study not found

get.summary: Returns a list of researchers assigned to a given study with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a  list of researchers linked to a given study. Supports filtering by researcher name and assignment date.

parameters.name: studyID
parameters.description: The ID of the study.

parameters.name: researcherName
parameters.description: Used to filter researchers by their full name.

parameters.name: dtAssigned
parameters.description: Used to filter researchers based on the day they were added to the study.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the team members by (e.g., 'researcherName' or 'dt').

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the results in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: List of researchers in the study retrieved.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging or study not found.

post.summary: Assigns a researcher to a study
post.description: Adds a Researcher (User) to a Study. Verifies the existence of both entities.

200.description: Researcher added to the study successfully.

400.description: Study or researcher not found.

schema.example: Study not found / Researcher not found

delete.summary: Removes a researcher from a study (Soft Delete)
delete.description: Marks a study reseracher as deleted.

parameters.name: srId
parameters.description: The ID from the StudyResearchers table.

200.description: Researcher successfully removed from the study.

404.description: Researcher doesn't belong to the study.

schema.example: Researcher doesn't belong to the study.

get.summary: Returns students assigned to a specific study with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of students assigned to a given research study. Supports filtering records by student full name and their organization.

parameters.name: studyId
parameters.description: The ID of the research study.

parameters.name: fullName
parameters.description: Used to filter assigned students by their first and last name.

parameters.name: partnerName
parameters.description: Used to filter results based on the partner organisation name.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the assigned students by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the results in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: List of students assigned to the research study retrieved.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

post.summary: Assigns a student to a research study
post.description: Adds a Student to a Study. Verifies that both the study and student exist.

200.description: Student assigned to the research study successfully.

400.description: Study or student not found.

schema.example: Study not found / Student not found

delete.summary: Removes a student from a study (Soft Delete)
delete.description: Marks the student-study pair as deleted.

parameters.name: ssId
parameters.description: The ID from the StudyStudents table.

200.description: Student successfully removed from the study.

404.description: Student not a part of the study.

schema.example: Student not a part of the study

get.summary: Returns a list of user roles with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of user roles. Supports filtering by name and creation date.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Used to filter roles by their name.

parameters.name: dtCreated
parameters.description: Used to filter roles by their creation date.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the roles by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the results in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

200.description: Success: List of user roles retrieved.

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

post.description: Adds a new user role to the system.

400.description: Invalid or missing role name.

post.description: Edits the role's editable data (name). Validates string input.

schema.example: Role not found

delete.summary: Deletes a specific user role (Soft Delete)
delete.description: Marks an user role as deleted.

parameters.name: roleId
parameters.description: The id of the role.

schema.example: Role not found

get.summary: Returns a list of all active users with filtering, sorting, and paging.
get.description: Retrieves a list of users. Supports filtering by full name and role.

parameters.name: fullName
parameters.description: Used to filter users by their full name.

parameters.name: roleName
parameters.description: Used to filter users by their role.

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Number of the page (Validation: minimum value 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of elements on a single page (Validation: whole number between 1 and 100).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the profiles by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the results in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

400.description: Invalid parameters for filters or paging.

post.description: Registers a new user. Validates input strings and the existence of the selected role.

400.description: Invalid or empty input data, user role not found.

schema.example: Username is required / First name and Last name required / Password is required / Role not found.

get.summary: Returns data for a given user account
get.description: Retrieves the data for a given user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The id of the user.

400.description: User not found.

schema.example: User not found

get.summary: Returns users with a Curator role with filtering and sorting
get.description: Retrieves users with a curator role, with name filtering. Used in dropdowns / read only UI elements.

parameters.name: fullName
parameters.description: Filters the curator results by name.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the curator list by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the results in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

get.summary: Returns users with a Researcher role, with filtering and sorting
get.description: Retrieves a list of users with a Researcher role. Used in dropdowns and read only UI elements. Supports name filtering.

parameters.name: fullName
parameters.description: Filters the researchers by name.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field to sort the researcher list by.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Direction to sort the results in (Validation: 'asc' or 'desc').

post.description: Edits user information. Validates user data, user existance, user cridentials if neeeded.

400.description: Text inputs invalid or empty, Role or User not found.

schema.example: All fields are required / Role not found / User not found

delete.description: Marks an user as deleted.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID index of the user.

schema.example: User not found
